question: According to the chart, how does the total number of visitors at Station Y compare to Station Z over the days shown?

options.A: Station Y has about half as many visitors as Station Z
options.B: Station Y and Station Z have roughly the same number of visitors
options.C: Station Y has slightly more visitors than Station Z
options.D: Station Y has more than twice as many visitors as Station Z

explanation: The y-axis starts at 800 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Station Z look as large as (or larger than) Station Y even though the totals favor Station Y.
